channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [FAALCON] Faalcon Concepts bags \u20b941.78 Lacs work order from Tushti Homes LLP
item.description:
Faalcon Concepts Limited has announced receiving a new work order from Tushti Homes LLP. The contract is for a site located at BLB-061, The Belaire, DLF Phase 5, Gurugram, Haryana. The total value of the order amounts to \u20b941,77,800. The nature of the work involves Glass, Glazing & windows, and the project is expected to be completed within a timeframe of two months. The order was awarded by a domestic entity, and the company confirmed that there is no promoter or promoter group interest in Tushti Homes LLP, nor does it fall under related party transactions.

  • Faalcon Concepts secured a new domestic work order.
  • The order is valued at \u20b941.78 Lacs from Tushti Homes LLP.
  • The contract involves glass, glazing, and window installations.
  • Project completion is anticipated within a two-month period.
  • The transaction is not a related party transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Faalcon Concepts Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [FUTSOL] Futuristic Solutions Board to meet Apr 29 for Q4/FY26 results & auditors
item.description:
Futuristic Solutions Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will hold a meeting on April 29, 2026. The key agenda items include considering and approving the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also discuss the re-appointment of the Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27 and the Secretarial Auditor for a five-year term, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming 43rd Annual General Meeting. In accordance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for insiders will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Re-appointment of Internal and Secretarial Auditors on agenda.
  • Trading window closed until results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FUTURISTIC SOLUTIONS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FERMENTA] FERMENTA shares admitted to trade on NSE
item.description:
Fermenta Biotech Ltd's equity shares have been admitted for dealings under the "Permitted to Trade" category on the National Stock Exchange (Capital Market segment). This admission is effective from April 20, 2026, as per NSE Circular Ref. No. 0645/2026 dated April 17, 2026, and in pursuance of Regulation 3.1.1 of the NSE (Capital Market) Trading Regulations Part A. This development allows the company's shares to be traded on the NSE platform, expanding trading avenues for investors.

  • Fermenta Biotech shares admitted to NSE's 'Permitted to Trade' category.
  • Trading on NSE Capital Market segment effective from April 20, 2026.
  • Admission is under NSE Regulation 3.1.1.
  • Enhances trading avenues for the company's equity shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fermenta Biotech Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [PVVINFRA] PVV Infra Board Appoints MD, WTD, 2 IDs; CFO Resigns
item.description:
PVV Infra Ltd's Board of Directors, at a meeting on April 21, 2026, approved significant management changes. Mr. Shubh Gangully was appointed as Managing Director for five years, and Mr. Gadde Rama Krishna as a Wholetime Director for five years. The Board also appointed Mr. Shrikant Pathak and Mr. Krishna Karthik Pothur as Independent Directors, each for a five-year term. All appointments are subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. Concurrently, Mr. Tirumala Rao Kunderu tendered his resignation from the positions of Whole-Time Director and Chief Financial Officer.

  • Shubh Gangully appointed Managing Director for five years.
  • Gadde Rama Krishna appointed Wholetime Director for five years.
  • Shrikant Pathak and Krishna Karthik Pothur appointed Independent Directors.
  • Tirumala Rao Kunderu resigned as Whole-Time Director and CFO.
  • All new appointments are subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PVV Infra Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [OMEGAIN] Omega Interactive Board to Consider FY26 Results on April 24, 2026
item.description:
Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on Friday, April 24, 2026. The primary agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the standalone audited financial results of the company for the fiscal period that ended on March 31, 2026. This intimation is made in compliance with Regulation 29 of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 24, 2026.
  • To consider standalone audited financial results for FY26.
  • Meeting is in compliance with SEBI Regulation 29.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMEGA INTERACTIVE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INTELLECT] Intellect partners with Khalsa Credit Union for digital banking platform
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Intellect Design Arena Ltd. has announced a strategic partnership with Khalsa Credit Union (KCU) in British Columbia, Canada. KCU will adopt Intellect's eMACH.ai Digital Engagement Platform (DEP) to transform its digital banking ecosystem. This initiative aims to deliver a more seamless, intuitive, and member-centric digital banking experience. The partnership will modernize KCU's digital capabilities, enabling a unified experience across mobile and online channels, improving service adoption, and enhancing member retention. KCU expects to benefit from an enhanced member experience, greater agility in launching new products, operational efficiencies, and future-ready scalability through a composable, microservices-based platform. This collaboration underscores Intellect's commitment to driving digital success for financial institutions globally.

  • Intellect partners with Khalsa Credit Union for digital banking platform.
  • KCU will adopt Intellect's eMACH.ai Digital Engagement Platform (DEP).
  • The platform aims to enhance member experience and operational efficiency.
  • It will enable KCU to launch new products faster and ensure scalability.
  • This deal strengthens Intellect's presence in the Canadian financial market.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Intellect Design Arena Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [SAATVIKGL] Saatvik Green Energy's Subsidiary Bags ₹71.25 Cr Solar Module Order
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Saatvik Green Energy Ltd announced that its material subsidiary, Saatvik Solar Industries Private Limited, has secured a significant domestic order valued at INR 71.25 Crores. The order, received from a renowned Independent Power Producer/EPC Player, is for the supply of Solar PV Modules. This commercial contract is expected to be executed by May 2026 and is not a related party transaction, reinforcing the company's position in the renewable energy sector.

  • Subsidiary secured a ₹71.25 Cr order for solar PV modules.
  • Order received from a renowned Independent Power Producer/EPC Player.
  • Domestic contract for solar PV modules.
  • Execution of the order is expected by May 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [PRIMAIN] Prima Board to meet on April 28 for property sale, loan closure, gratuity trust
item.description:
Prima Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting for April 28, 2026, at 03:00 PM IST. The agenda includes approving the sale or assignment of a guest house property, closing the associated loan from ICICI Bank, and establishing an Employee’s Group Gratuity Trust. These items indicate strategic asset management and employee welfare initiatives by the company.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 28, 2026, at 03:00 PM IST.
  • Agenda includes approving the sale/assignment of a guest house property.
  • Consideration of closing the ICICI Bank loan related to the property.
  • Approval for creating an Employee’s Group Gratuity Trust.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRIMA INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [UML] Umiya Mobile to open 37 new retail stores across 3 states
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Umiya Mobile Limited has announced plans to open 37 new retail stores in the near future. These new stores will be located across three Indian states: Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, and Gujarat. The expansion aims to significantly increase the company's physical retail footprint and market reach in these regions. The filing provides a detailed list of all 37 proposed store addresses, indicating a strategic move to enhance accessibility for customers.

  • Umiya Mobile plans to open 37 new retail stores.
  • Expansion targets Madhya Pradesh, Maharashtra, and Gujarat.
  • Move aims to significantly increase the company's market presence.
  • Detailed addresses for all new locations were provided.
  • This initiative signals a focus on retail network growth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Umiya Mobile Ltd | Category: Expansion

item.title: [UML] Umiya Mobile opens 2 new retail stores in Gujarat
item.description:
Umiya Mobile Limited has announced the opening of two new retail stores in Gujarat. Both stores commenced operations on April 21, 2026. One store is located at City Survey No. 3141, Unai Road, Vyara, Tapi, Vyara - 394650, Gujarat. The second store is situated on the Ground Floor, Shop 1, 2, Krishna Complex, Nagnath Road, Amreli, Nr. Head Post Office, Amreli - 365601, Gujarat. This expansion is in compliance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Umiya Mobile opened two new retail stores.
  • Both stores are located in Gujarat.
  • The new stores are in Vyara and Amreli.
  • Stores commenced operations on April 21, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Umiya Mobile Ltd | Category: Expansion
